title: EGYM to merge with Playlist: CEO talks new $7.5 billion evaluation
text:
EGYM to merge with Playlist: CEO talks new $7.5 billion evaluation

EGYM co-founder and CEO Philipp Roesch-Schlanderer sits down with Jared Blikre to explain the smart fitness equipment company's merger with Playlist — the parent company of workout subscription service ClassPass — and discuss the new company's current valuation of $7.5 billion.

title: Fake Ledger App on Apple App Store Drains Over $400,000 in Bitcoin
text:
Fake Ledger App on Apple App Store Drains Over $400,000 in Bitcoin

A fake Ledger app from Apple’s Mac App Store drained nearly 6 BTC, worth more than $424,000, from the musician G. Love.

title: Apple is closing down first of its U.S. stores
text:
Apple is closing down first of its U.S. stores

Apple has not had many public labor fights, but its latest just got a lot harder to ignore. The company confirmed on April 9 that it will permanently close its store at Towson Town Center in Maryland in June. The store will not be replaced. The Towson location was the first Apple retail store in ...

title: Why a $70,000 Dividend Income Goal Requires Millions, and Which ETF Gets You There Fastest
text:
Why a $70,000 Dividend Income Goal Requires Millions, and Which ETF Gets You There Fastest

Replacing a $70,000 salary with dividend income alone requires a specific portfolio size, and the required portfolio size is larger than most people expect. At a 3.39% yield from SCHD, the portfolio required to generate $70,000 per year before taxes runs into the millions, and the exact figure shifts depending on which fund you choose. ... title: TSMC’s Record Q1 AI Revenue Puts Capex And Growth In Focus
text:
TSMC’s Record Q1 AI Revenue Puts Capex And Growth In Focus

TSMC (NYSE:TSM) reported preliminary Q1 2026 results showing record revenue growth, driven by strong demand for AI chips and advanced-node manufacturing. Revenue for the quarter was up 35% year on year, exceeding earlier expectations and supported by orders from major customers including Nvidia and Apple. The company also reported strong March 2026 revenue on both a month on month and year on year basis, alongside continued investment in capacity. Management issued a confident outlook for...

title: Gary Black Says Tesla's 8-Week Slide Driven By 'Disappointing' Deliveries, Robotaxi Doubts: 'EVs Still Comprise 70%...'
text:
Gary Black Says Tesla's 8-Week Slide Driven By 'Disappointing' Deliveries, Robotaxi Doubts: 'EVs Still Comprise 70%...'

Investor Gary Black, who is a managing partner at The Future Fund LLC, has outlined his take on why Tesla, Inc. has been declining for the past eight weeks. Disappointing Deliveries On Thursday, the investor shared why he thought TSLA stock was on the decline in a post on the social media platform X.
